alkylation reagent: alkylation with 5 mm 2-chloroacetamide for 1 h at room temperature.
alkylation concentration: alkylation with 5 mm 2-chloroacetamide for 1 h at room temperature.
cleavage agent: digestion was performed overnight with trypsin at a 1:20 enzyme:protein ratio.
collision energy: for decision tree-based ion trap HCD (normalized collision energy of 35%) or ETD fragmentation.
enrichment method: performed large-scale immunoaffinity purification of deoxycholate-solubilized AGO1 complexes.
fractionation method: performed sucrose gradient centrifugation of microsomal fractions from Col-0 and era1–2.
fragmentation method: for decision tree-based ion trap HCD (normalized collision energy of 35%) or ETD fragmentation.
instrument: The Thermo Scientific Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer (Thermo Fisher Scientific, San Jose, CA) was operated in data-dependent mode.
reduction reagent: Proteins were reduced with 1 mm dl-DTT for 1 h at room temperature.
reduction concentration: Proteins were reduced with 1 mm dl-DTT for 1 h at room temperature.
